data.title: Buffett Reflects on 60 Years at Berkshire Helm: 'Cardinal Sin Is Delaying the Correction of Mistakes'
data.description: In his latest annual letter to shareholders, Warren Buffett celebrated 60 years of steering the ship at Berkshire Hathaway and expressed confidence in the company's future under chosen successor Greg Abel.

data.title: Medicaid Faces $880 Billion Cuts — But Trump Says Social Security Is Safe
Ray Dalio's 'Holy Grail' Investment Strategy: Why 10-15 Diversified Investments Could Make You a Fortune
data.description: Billionaire investor Ray Dalio recently offered insights on successful investing, emphasizing the importance of diversification and patience in investment strategies.

data.title: Trump Moves To Impose Tariffs On Countries With Digital Taxes, Defending Apple, Amazon, Meta, Google And Other US Tech Giants
data.description: President Donald Trump ordered his trade chief to reopen investigations into digital service taxes imposed on U.S. tech firms.

data.title: Trump Team Threatens To Cut Ukraine's Access To Elon Musk's Starlink Over Minerals Dispute: Report
data.description: US negotiators have reportedly threatened to cut Ukraine's access to SpaceX's Starlink satellite internet service.
